root_cause: OCS cognition existed without a runtime that generated bounded improvement-intent candidates from cognition findings and replay-visible history.
runtime_model: The runtime validates cognition artifact hash, cognition hash, replay visibility, completed status, and false authority flags.
The runtime consumes explicit replay-visible execution, validation, failure, and operator-decision history.
History is normalized into deterministic pattern keys.
Recurring failures, recurring clarification requests, recurring operator interventions, and capability gaps become proposal-eligible improvement candidates.
The runtime computes intent_hash from source cognition identity, normalized history, candidates, counts, authority flags, status, and failure state.
Replay reconstruction validates ordering, wrapper hashes, artifact hashes, returned continuity, and intent hash continuity.
replay_impact: OCS can now generate append-only replay-visible improvement-intent candidate evidence.
Replay reconstruction can prove which cognition hash and replay history produced each candidate.
Identical OCS cognition and replay history produce the same intent hash.
The runtime does not mutate source replay.
The runtime does not invoke providers, workers, PPP, approval, governance mutation, implementation, or execution.
